Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Momentum Ranker Analysis - Today's Data The dashboard shows ATEX commanding the #1 rank with a dominant composite score of 95.1, driven by exceptional consistency across all scoring dimensions: returns (88.8), ratio progression (99.6), and resilience on bad SPY days (96.9). ATEX's 6-month return of 236.79% and 1-year return of 159.18% tower above peers, while maintaining all four SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day) in bullish alignment. By contrast, EACO ranks lower despite solid fundamentals—a 164.99% 1-year return and clean SMA passes—because its ratio consistency drops to 4 passes (versus ATEX's 5) and it shows weaker short-term momentum with a flat 1.0 ratio between 1-week and 1-day returns. The data reveals a sharp bifurcation: ATEX exhibits textbook strong momentum with smooth ratio progression (168x then 7.6x then 2.0x scaling), while EACO's momentum appears compressed into older timeframes, making it less ideal for a short-term ranking system that prizes current-window consistency.
